pricing.note: All prices are inclusive of professional fees. Govt. fees charged separately.

company_registration: Latest Address Proof (utility bill, < 2 months old)

policies.payment_terms: 50% advance required to initiate work; balance before final delivery
policies.refund_policy: No refund once work has been initiated
policies.confidentiality: Strict client data confidentiality maintained at all times
policies.data_security: All client documents stored securely with restricted access

faqs.question: Do you provide services outside Punjab?
faqs.answer: Yes, we serve clients pan-India through our fully online process.

faqs.question: Can I file ITR without Form 16?
faqs.answer: Yes, ITR can be filed using bank statements, salary slips, and AIS/TIS from the income tax portal.

faqs.question: Do you assist in handling GST notices?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide end-to-end support for GST notices including drafting replies and appearing before the officer.

faqs.question: How do I share my documents with you?
faqs.answer: You can upload documents securely at sharmaca.com/upload or share via WhatsApp.

faqs.question: What is the last date to file ITR?
faqs.answer: For most individuals, the deadline is July 31st of the assessment year. We recommend filing early to avoid penalties.

faqs.question: Do you offer a free consultation?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer a free 15-minute initial consultation. Book your slot at sharmaca.com/book.

faqs.question: Can you help register my startup?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in startup compliance including company registration, GST, and ongoing ROC filings.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept UPI, bank transfer, and all major payment apps. A payment link is shared on confirmation.

ai_assistant_guidelines.language: Simple and jargon-free English; switch to Hindi/Punjabi if client initiates
ai_assistant_guidelines.greeting: Always greet with firm trade name on first message
rules: Answer only based on the data provided — never fabricate information
Provide exact pricing when asked; mention govt. fees are extra if applicable
Suggest the most relevant service based on the client's query
Ask a follow-up question if the query is vague
Always offer WhatsApp or booking link when closing a conversation
If information is unavailable, say: 'Please contact us directly for details'
ai_assistant_guidelines.escalation_trigger: If client is confused or asks for a human, offer: 'Would you like to schedule a call with our CA?'

ivr_conversation_flow: 2. Ask: What can I help you with today?
3. Identify the service category (GST / ITR / Registration / Other)
4. Provide relevant pricing and turnaround time
7. Offer human CA support if needed
